name: Cake-Pan Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cold water or strong coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. In a 9" x 9-inch cake pan, measure and thoroughly blend together with a fork the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda, instant coffee powder, and salt.
3. Make three indentations in the dry ingredients with your fork. Into the first, pour 6 tablespoons of oil. Into the second, pour 1 tablespoon of vinegar. Into the third, pour 1 teaspoon of vanilla.
4. Over all ingredients, pour 1 cup of cold water or strong, cold coffee. Stir until evenly blended.
5. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Serve alone, with whipped cream, ice cream, or your favorite frosting.
